title: Filipino Vegan Tinola
description: A vegan twist on the classic Filipino chicken tinola soup. This version uses smoked flavor to mimic the savory taste of chicken.

ingredients.name: Pickle
ingredients.notes: chopped pickled ginger for added flavor

ingredients.name: Smoked Vegan Chicken Strips
ingredients.notes: store-bought or homemade smoked vegan chicken strips

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the Filipino tinola mix and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped pickle and dill, and sauté for another minute.
Add 4 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and add the smoked vegan chicken strips.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
